ImageDescription.value:
“UZH” (2024) is a Neo Pop artwork by Venezuelan artist Honys Torres, created as part of the Zürich POP collection.

The central LEGO‑style figure represents Albert Einstein, referencing his historical connection to Zürich, where he studied and later taught at the University of Zurich (Universität Zürich). Behind him appears the iconic façade of the UZH Zentrum, anchoring the composition in one of the city’s most emblematic academic landmarks. Torres blends scientific symbols, mathematical formulas, cartoon characters, and pop‑culture elements to create a vibrant visual dialogue between intellectual heritage and contemporary urban culture. The work reflects her interest in knowledge, creativity, and the playful reinterpretation of cultural icons within Zürich’s visual identity.

Medium: Acrylic on canvas Dimensions: 70 × 70 cm

Year: 2024
